covered_contracts: HTTPBasic is a first-class OpenAPI security dependency and decodes Basic credentials
OAuth2 is a first-class OpenAPI security dependency with scoped requirements
OpenIdConnect is a first-class OpenAPI security dependency with discovery URL metadata
MutualTLS is a first-class OpenAPI security dependency
HTTPBasic, OAuth2, OpenIdConnect, and MutualTLS project consistently into OpenAPI and OpenRPC security metadata
